understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the scenario was to get any pushable object, such as the selected piece or a block, to reach or exceed the specified target x-coordinate within the available step budget, prioritizing efficient moves to avoid failure.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement shifts the selected piece by one STEP (3 pixels) in the chosen direction, and pushing occurs if a pushable object is adjacent, moving it along with the piece; walls can block movement or pushes, with potential variations in behavior that require observing outcomes, while SELECT allows switching the controllable object.

history.summary: Turn 1: MOVE_RIGHT | The selected piece is adjacent to a pushable block on the right, so moving right will attempt to push the block towards the target x=6.
